summary: Tested 3 new improvements to Hujjah trivia: (8) team-size recommendation message, (9) UI size improvements, (10) no regressions. All features passing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 improvements (8/9/10) verified. Setup page shows team-size-recommendation (data-testid present, visible, non-blocking). Game board shows large team names, large golden scores, turn indicator. Timer SVG is 173px (>130px req). Score assign buttons show large 300+/600+/900+ text with team names. Category names are readable. Full flow: home->setup->categories->game->question->answer works.

test_results.team_size_recommendation_visible: PASS - '💡 يُنصح بلاعبين أو أكثر لكل فريق للاستمتاع الكامل' shown with data-testid='team-size-recommendation'
test_results.recommendation_non_blocking: PASS - التالي button enabled without team count
test_results.game_board_large_team_names: PASS - الأسود/النسور shown in large text in header panels
test_results.game_board_large_scores: PASS - 0 shown in large golden text below team names
test_results.turn_indicator: PASS - 'دور الأسود 🔴' shown with animation at bottom
test_results.score_assign_buttons_large: PASS - '300+' shown in visually large text on colored team buttons
test_results.category_names_readable: PASS - Arabic category names visible on game board cards
